basic_details.job_title: Tripura University Project Associate I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Tripura University has released the official Project Associate I Notification 2026 on 15-05-2026 at tripurauniv.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the Tripura University Project Associate I Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates with a PCI approved Master’s degree in Pharmaceutical Sciences (preferably M. Pharm in Pharmaceutical Chemistry/Medicinal Chemistry) and a maximum age of 32 years can apply via email from now until 18-05-2026. The official notification PDF and email application details are available below.

qualification.education_qualification: PCI approved master degree in Pharmaceutical Sciences with first class (preferable M. Pharm in Pharmaceutical Chemistry/Medicinal Chemistry)
qualification.details: PCI approved master degree in Pharmaceutical Sciences with first class (preferable M. Pharm in Pharmaceutical Chemistry/Medicinal Chemistry) Desirable: GPAT qualified, Research experience in medicinal chemistry

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 18-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Tripura University Project Associate-I recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to send your advance CV via email for the Project Associate-I position at Tripura University is 18th May 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Associate-I post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a PCI approved Master's degree in Pharmaceutical Sciences with a first-class result. A Master of Pharmacy (M. Pharm) in Pharmaceutical Chemistry or Medicinal Chemistry is preferred.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Project Associate-I position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Project Associate-I post is 32 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Associate-I role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 25,000 plus 10% House Rent Allowance (HRA) per month.

faq.question: Q5. How will the selection be done for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Associate-I position will be based on a Walk-in Interview.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the post of Project Associate-I in this recruitment drive by Tripura University.

faq.question: Q8. When is the Walk-in Interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview for the Project Associate-I position is scheduled to be held on 21st May 2026.

faq.question: Q9. What are the desirable qualifications for the Project Associate-I post?
faq.answer: Desirable qualifications include being GPAT qualified and having research experience in medicinal chemistry.

faq.question: Q10. Where is Tripura University located?
faq.answer: Tripura University is located in Suryamaninagar, Tripura, with the pincode 799022.
